title: Superhot
description: Time moves only when you move
body: # Superhot This mod implements the core game mechanic from the game *Superhot*. When you are still, time moves very slowly (1/20 of normal speed), and when you move, time speeds up. ## Commands ``` /superhot on ``` ``` /superhot off ``` --- Note: Only tested with one online player. [](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) Inspired by a recent MumboJumbo video. Not affiliated with the official game Superhot in any way.
